name: Stable Prefix Context
description: OpenClaw context engine that canonicalizes volatile wrappers and emits prompt-stability diagnostics.

telemetryPath.description: Optional JSONL output path for assemble diagnostics.

rewriteTranscript.description: Rewrite older wrapper-heavy transcript entries into canonical form.

maxInternalContextChars.description: Maximum internal runtime context characters to retain after canonicalization.

maxConversationWrapperBodyChars.description: Maximum conversation wrapper body characters to retain after canonicalization.
